grids.property_gallery_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 grid-rows-2 gap-2 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden

surfaces_and_components.header: Sticky Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-border z-50

buttons.primary: bg-rose-500 hover:bg-rose-600 text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-800 text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.pill_filter: rounded-full border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-800 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all

iconography.style: Clean, line-based, consistent stroke width (1.5px to 2px)

images.description: High-end Mediterranean villa for hero section or premium listing.
Scandinavian treehouse for unique stays section.
Smiling user portrait for reviews or host profile.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Outfit for all headings and Manrope for body text.

Property listing cards must NOT use Shadcn Card by default. Build them with pure HTML/Tailwind: a rounded-xl image wrapper (aspect-[4/3]) and clean text below. Images must scale on hover (`group-hover:scale-105`) while the wrapper stays `overflow-hidden`.
Implement a 'Bento' style image gallery for the Property Details Page: 1 large image on the left (col-span-1 md:col-span-2 row-span-2), and 4 smaller images on the right.
Use Lucide-react for all icons (Heart, Star, MapPin, Search).
The search bar should be a prominent, pill-shaped container with divided sections (Where, When, Who) and a primary brand color search button, utilizing glassmorphism or a clean white drop-shadow.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
For the booking calendar, use Shadcn Calendar but customize it to look seamless with the brand.
Keep borders very subtle (border-slate-200) and favor whitespace over structural lines.
